{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Kad tee nn starp teem Pa-
ganeem Draugutus par Maktu
irr faderrejschi/ tad ir es tohs
fapulzinatchu/ un tee gann mas
irr behdajtchees pahr to Nastu ta
Kehnixa/ un to Leelu-Kungu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Tapehz ka Eewräims tohs
Altarus irr wairojis/ par Ap-
grehkfchann/ tad irr winnam tee
Altari par Grehkeem tapputchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Es rakstiju winnam man-
u zeentigu Bausli preekschâ/ bet
ta tappe ka fivefcha Leeta turretâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Par Uppurefschana/ ko tee
nan dohd/ gann te Baltu uppuz-
e/ un ehd to/ bet tam KUN-
BAM ne irr labs Prahts pee
eem/ nn peeminnehs wiſsch-
vinnu Noseegumus/ un peenek-
ehs winnu Grehkus/ tee gree-
chahs uhs Egipti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Jo Israëls irr sawu Dar-
ifaju aismirtis/ un ( Deewek
u ) Nammus darrijs/ nn Juh-
a wairo stiprus Pilefahtus/
et es fuhtischu Ugguni winnu
Pilefahtôs/ tas aprihs winna
aistus Namimus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "prett tawu Deewu Manzibu/ tu
mihto Manku-Algu us wiſſeem
Labbibas Klohneim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Tas Klohnês un Wihna-
Spaids tewt ne pabarrohs/ un
tas jauns Wihns winnai pee-
cruhks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Tee ne paliks eekſch ta
KUNGA Semmes/ bet Eewrä-
ums atgreesifees uhs Egipti/ un
tee ehdihês eekſch Affirijas to/ kas
neschſthfts irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Tee ne nefihs tam KUN-
GAM Dseeramo-Uppurus no
Wihna/ ir tee winnam faldi ne
buhtu. Winno Maise buhtu
teem ka Randu-Maise/ ka wiſſi/
tas to buhtu ehduſchi/ apgahni-
tohs/ jo winno Maise buhs teem
preekſch few pascheein ja-ehd/ un
ne nahks eekſch ta KUNGA
Naimma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Ko tad darrijeet juhs eezele-
tâ Swehtku-Deenâ? un kahdâ
Deenâ ta KUNGA Swehtku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Jo redsi/ teem irr ja-atseet
tahs Pohſtischanas Deht/ Egip-
tes-Semme tohs fapulzinahs/
Mowe winnas apraks. Nah-
tres turrehs winni eekahrojama
Sudraba Weetâ/Ehrſchki buhs
winnu Dshwoftôs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Tahs Peemeſſlefchanaſ
Deenas irr nahkuſchas/ tahs
Atmakkafchanaſ Deenas irr
klaht/ tee no Israëta to fajut-
tihs. Tee Praueefchi irr Gef-
ki/ tee Barra-Leelitaji irr trak-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
